support_files.requirements_basis: upstream skills/ppt-master/requirements.txt @ v4.1.0 plus retained SUSTech renderer dependencies
support_files.env_example_basis: upstream .env.example @ v4.1.0 plus SUSTech release support header

notes: SUSTech v0.4.0 continuity release on the formal upstream v4.1.0 tag. Adopts staged workflows, versioned specs and page context, normalized template workspaces, explicit PowerPoint structure, chart/native-data updates, and SVG hardening while preserving legacy brief-lock read and explicit strict-audit compatibility, layout-quality diagnostics, local assets, strict-local packaging, and conservative ppt_text_normalize scan/apply support.
